title: Post Award Quick Guide — eTraining Module (Articulate Rise)
display_label: Post Award Quick Guide eTraining (Articulate Rise)
content: Self-paced Articulate Rise interactive training module that introduces PIs and research staff to the post-award lifecycle at Morgan State University. Contains 9 sub-modules: (1) establishing guidelines using the Notice of Award; (2) determining allowable costs/expenses/activities; (3) setting up the award in Banner and introducing spending instruments; (4) troublesome expenses and audit-finding risks; (5) other compliance matters; (6) reporting requirements; (7) prior approvals required from the funding agency; (8) ORA resources; (9) responsible officers at MSU. Use after a new award is received as the recommended first stop before deeper module training.
